name: Resonant Tank Capacitor — IH Series
description: Water-cooled resonant capacitors designed for induction heating systems operating at 1 kHz to 400 kHz. Optimised for low ESR and high ripple current handling in hardening, brazing, annealing, and forging applications.

name: Induction Melting Capacitor Bank — IM Series
description: Heavy-duty capacitor banks for coreless and channel induction furnaces melting steel, iron, copper, aluminium, and precious metals. Engineered for continuous operation under high reactive power loads with capacities from sub-tonne to 100-tonne furnaces.

name: High Energy Pulse Capacitor — PF Series
description: Low-inductance, fast-discharge capacitors for pulsed power systems including inertial confinement fusion drivers and Z-pinch devices. Rated up to 100 kJ per unit with sub-microsecond discharge capability and high charge-discharge cycle life.

name: Modular Pulse Capacitor Bank — PB Series
description: Scalable bank assemblies for large-scale pulsed power installations delivering terawatt-class instantaneous power. Designed for integration into fusion energy research facilities, railgun systems, and high-power microwave sources.

name: Shunt Capacitor Bank — HV Series
description: Reactive power compensation capacitor banks for AC transmission and distribution substations. Available for 10 kV, 35 kV, 110 kV, and 220 kV systems. Dual-rated for power factor correction and harmonic filter tuning, compliant with GB/T and IEC standards.

name: Harmonic Filter Capacitor — HF Series
description: Tuned harmonic filter capacitors for substation installations where non-linear loads generate harmonic distortion. Configured with series reactors into C-type or single-tuned filter banks, protecting grid equipment and improving power quality.
